management_always_paid.name: Puerta Abierta
management_always_paid.description: Company utility share — paid on every sale

management_conditional.description: GC and Supervisor resolved from commission_gerencia_assignments (temporal, per-project). Uses sale_date to determine which holder was active when the sale was made.

ejecutivo.description: Rate stored on sales.ejecutivo_rate (per-unit, confirmed by CFO). Not looked up from commission_rates.
ejecutivo.backfill_model: Policy-period escalation: 1.00% below threshold, 1.25% at/above threshold
ejecutivo.note: Replaces legacy sales_reps array which was never populated in commission_rates

ahorro.name: Ahorro
ahorro.description: Absorbs remaining commission pool. Variable per sale. Computed in calculate_commissions() Section 4.
ahorro.note: Migration 035: changed from fixed 0.35% to dynamic residual

ahorro_por_retiro.name: Ahorro por Retiro
ahorro_por_retiro.condition: commission paid to sales rep AFTER sales_rep.contract_end_date → redirect here

disbursability.description: Recipients with disbursable=false are accumulation-only: commission rows generated for tracking but never disbursed.

isr.formula: Total a pagar = Total a facturar × 107/112
isr.description: 5% ISR retention on pre-IVA amount. Applied to all recipients except company-internal accounts.
isr.exempt_recipients_note: Configurable via commission_rates.isr_exempt column. Defaults: puerta_abierta, ahorro, ahorro_comercial, ahorro_por_retiro.
